## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting to discuss a content marketing engagement between Knapsack (an AI automation company) and fwd.digital (a growth marketing agency).](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Main goal is to drive 1,000 users to Knapsack's waitlist by end of August through organic content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Target audience is knowledge workers in finance and healthcare industries struggling with data privacy concerns when using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on creating compelling use cases and automations that showcase Knapsack's value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Initial focus on creating landing pages for specific automations, with long-term goal of building a comprehensive automation library](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)

## Topics

### Target Audience

  - [Knowledge workers in finance (e.g. financial advisors, mortgage brokers) and healthcare (e.g. healthcare insurance) industries](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Mid-level employees dealing with high information load and constraints](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Unable to use existing AI tools due to data privacy/security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Looking for AI solutions to boost productivity and impact without compromising data](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

### Goals and Metrics

  - [Increase waitlist signups from 300 to 1,000 by end of August](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Drive work email signups to identify potential enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Long-term: 1,000 daily active users, with most being paid/enterprise tier](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Achieve 1:10 CAC:LTV ratio through organic+paid efforts](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Build library of compelling automation use cases and landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
  - [Cover both efficiency (time-saving) and impact (better job performance) angles](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
  - [Explore tangential topics like RPA that audience is researching](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
  - [Leverage $0 search volume opportunities with high intent](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
  - [Mix of high-intent low-volume and broader awareness topics](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)

### Action Items

  - [fwd.digital to provide 1-2 calibration articles in next 2 weeks for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=3792.0)
  - [Mark to share design assets, product videos etc. to aid content creation](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=3409.0)
  - [Decide on publishing domain - integrate with knap.ai or use separate Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=3472.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to conduct deeper research into audience, competitors, topics](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)
  - [Prioritize high-value use cases and automate content creation](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=2822.0)
  - [Set up publishing environment (CMS access or Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=3647.0)
  - [Review and approve calibration articles to align on quality](https://fathom.video/share/n2fTmapphNjfFcL_hKMzhmwyS8xk7hgy?tab=summary&timestamp=3844.0)
